name: Credex Auto Title Loans Miramar
description_short: Credex offers auto title loans in Miramar, FL with loan amounts from $750–$5,000 and same-day funding. No credit checks required; APR ranges from 18–35.95% with 6–24 month repayment terms.
description_long:
Credex has operated for over 12 years providing auto equity loans across Miami-Dade, Broward, and West Palm Beach counties in Florida. The company specializes in title-secured lending designed for borrowers who have been rejected by traditional financial institutions due to poor credit or lack of credit history. Credex operates a physical location at 6104 Miramar Pkwy in Miramar, FL with hours Mon–Fri 10am–4:30pm. The company is licensed under the Florida Consumer Finance Act (Florida Statute 516) and explicitly states its loans are exempt from licensing requirements under the Florida Title Loan Act. Credex advertises that over 98% of applications are approved, making it accessible to borrowers with credit challenges.

Credex's core offering is auto equity loans (marketed as title loans) ranging from $750 to $5,000, with same-day or next-day funding upon approval. Borrowers provide their vehicle's legal title as collateral but retain ownership and use of the vehicle throughout the loan term. The application process requires proof of residence, proof of income, and a national ID. Loan approval is based primarily on the borrower's ability to repay and vehicle condition. The company charges a $25 application fee (one-time), with APRs ranging from 18–35.95% depending on the specific loan terms. Repayment options span 6–24 months. Sample loans show monthly payments of $160.14 on an $2,230 loan at 34.57% APR over 18 months, and $246.21 on a $4,266.93 loan at 33.64% APR over 24 months. The company notes that additional insurance coverage may be required for approval.

Credex distinguishes itself through its no-credit-check lending model, high approval rates (98%+), and willingness to serve borrowers rejected elsewhere. The company emphasizes speed and simplicity compared to traditional bank processes. A notable protective measure is their explicit anti-fraud warning stating that Credex never requests payment, deposits, or fees before loan approval and contract signing. The company maintains regional presence across multiple Florida counties and provides multiple contact channels (phone, in-person, online application). Transparency disclosures include detailed APR ranges, fee structures, and sample loan calculations on their website.

While Credex offers genuine accessibility for credit-challenged borrowers, the loan structure carries inherent risks. APRs at 33–36% place these loans in the high-cost lending category, significantly above payday-alternative standards (36% APR cap). The collateral requirement means default risk results in loss of vehicle, creating severe consequences for borrowers already in financial distress. Monthly payments on typical loans ($160–$246) may strain budgets of borrowers who qualify. The company's targeting of rejected applicants suggests awareness of higher default risk, yet APR terms do not reflect risk mitigation for borrowers. Transparency is positive, but the product itself remains a costly emergency option suitable only when traditional lending is unavailable.
pros: Same-day or next-day funding available—rapid access to emergency cash
No credit checks required—accessible to borrowers with poor or no credit history
Over 98% approval rate according to company claims
Keep your vehicle—collateral doesn't prevent continued use of the car
Flexible repayment terms ranging from 6 to 24 months to match ability to repay
Licensed and regulated under Florida Consumer Finance Act (Florida Statute 516)
Anti-fraud protection—company explicitly warns against advance fee scams and provides fraud reporting email
cons: High APR range of 18–35.95% (max 35.95%) places loan cost significantly above payday-alternative standards
Vehicle title held as collateral—default results in loss of transportation, creating severe hardship for already-struggling borrowers
Loan amounts capped at $5,000 maximum, limiting utility for larger emergency needs
Additional insurance coverage may be required for approval, adding undisclosed costs
$25 application fee plus lien holder and document stamp tax charges ($93.25 included in loan amount per website)
best_for: Borrowers with poor or no credit history rejected by traditional banks or credit unions
Vehicle owners needing emergency cash within 24 hours for urgent expenses
Individuals who can afford monthly payments of $160–$250+ and retain vehicle use as essential transportation
Consumers in Miramar, Broward, Miami-Dade, or West Palm Beach counties with documented income and proof of residence
diagnosis: Credex is best for credit-challenged borrowers in South Florida who need emergency funds within 24 hours and have a vehicle with equity. The primary caveat is the high APR (up to 35.95%) and vehicle collateral risk—this should only be used when traditional emergency lending options (credit union PALs, employer advances, credit cards, or personal loans) are unavailable, as default means loss of essential transportation.
services: Same-day or next-day loan funding upon approval
Vehicle appraisal and loan amount determination based on car value
Online loan application and quotation form
In-person service at Miramar physical location (6104 Miramar Pkwy)
Document processing including proof of income, residency verification, and national ID verification
Multi-county service coverage (Miami-Dade, Broward, West Palm Beach)
Fraud protection and scam reporting assistance
FAQ resources and customer support via email (service@credex.net)
